aadhaar.name: Aadhaar Card
aadhaar.instructions: Visit uidai.gov.in or nearest Aadhaar Enrolment Centre • Fill enrolment form with photo ID proof • Provide biometric data (fingerprints, iris scan, photo) • Collect enrolment acknowledgement slip • Download e-Aadhaar from uidai.gov.in after 90 days

pan_card.name: PAN Card
pan_card.instructions: Apply online at incometaxindiaefiling.gov.in or via NSDL/UTIITSL portals • Fill Form 49A with personal details • Submit photo, ID proof, and address proof • Pay application fee • Receive PAN card by post within 15 working days

voter_id.name: Voter ID Card (EPIC)
voter_id.instructions: Visit nvsp.in or nearest Booth Level Officer (BLO) • Fill Form 6 for new registration • Submit photo, age proof, and address proof • Collect Voter ID within 30 days or download e-EPIC from nvsp.in

passport.name: Passport
passport.instructions: Register on passportindia.gov.in and fill online application • Book appointment at Passport Seva Kendra • Attend with original ID proof, address proof, DOB proof • Police verification conducted • Passport delivered within 3–7 working days

driving_license.name: Driving Licence
driving_license.instructions: Apply for Learner's Licence at sarathi.parivahan.gov.in • Pass online driving knowledge test • Practice for minimum 30 days • Apply for Permanent DL with medical certificate (Form 1A) • Attend practical driving test at RTO

ration_card.name: Ration Card
ration_card.instructions: Visit Food & Civil Supplies office or state ration card portal • Submit application with family details, income proof, address proof • Attach Aadhaar of all family members • After verification, card issued within 30–45 days

birth_certificate.name: Birth Certificate
birth_certificate.instructions: Report birth within 21 days at Municipal Corporation/Gram Panchayat • Fill birth registration form with hospital discharge summary • Submit parents' ID proof • Certificate issued within 7 working days • For delayed registration, apply to SDM with affidavit

death_certificate.name: Death Certificate
death_certificate.instructions: Report death within 21 days at Municipal Corporation/Gram Panchayat • Submit hospital death summary or doctor's certificate • Fill registration form with cause of death • Certificate issued within 7 working days • Also available at crsorgi.gov.in

marriage_certificate.name: Marriage Certificate
marriage_certificate.instructions: Apply at Sub-Registrar's office or state registration portal • Submit wedding proof, joint photo, ID and address proofs of both parties, and witness documents • Both parties and two witnesses must be present • Certificate issued same day in most states

divorce_certificate.name: Divorce Decree / Certificate
divorce_certificate.instructions: Obtain divorce decree from Family Court after legal proceedings • Apply for certified copy at the issuing court • Submit case number, date of decree, and ID proof • Certified copy issued within 7–30 working days

school_leaving_certificate.name: School Leaving Certificate (TC)
school_leaving_certificate.instructions: Submit written application to school principal • Attach no-dues certificate from library and fees department • Certificate issued within 7 days • Original handed to parent/guardian in person

ssc_marksheet.name: SSC / 10th Marksheet
ssc_marksheet.instructions: Collect from school after results declared • For duplicate, apply to State Board with original hall ticket and ID proof • Pay duplicate certificate fee • Board issues duplicate within 30–60 days

hsc_marksheet.name: HSC / 12th Marksheet
hsc_marksheet.instructions: Collect from school/junior college after results • For duplicate, apply to State Board with ID proof and hall ticket • Pay prescribed fee • Board issues duplicate marksheet within 30–60 days

degree_certificate.name: Degree / Graduation Certificate
degree_certificate.instructions: Apply to university registrar after completing all examinations • Submit completed application with hall tickets, marksheets, and ID proof • Pay convocation/degree fee • Collect at convocation or receive by post

migration_certificate.name: Migration Certificate
migration_certificate.instructions: Apply to institution's registrar or principal • Submit original marksheets and TC • For inter-university migration, obtain from granting university • Certificate issued within 15 working days

character_certificate.name: Character / Police Clearance Certificate
character_certificate.instructions: Apply online at state police portal or visit nearest police station • Fill form with personal details and purpose • Submit ID proof, address proof, and 2 passport photos • Background verification by local police • Certificate issued within 7–15 working days

income_certificate.name: Income Certificate
income_certificate.instructions: Apply at Tehsil office or state Jan Seva Kendra / e-district portal • Fill income declaration form with family income details • Submit Aadhaar, address proof, income documents (salary slip/bank statement) • Verified by revenue officer • Certificate issued within 7–15 working days

itr_acknowledgement.name: ITR Acknowledgement (Income Tax Return)
itr_acknowledgement.instructions: File your Income Tax Return at incometaxindiaefiling.gov.in • Log in with PAN as user ID • Choose appropriate ITR form based on income source • Fill and submit the return • Download ITR-V acknowledgement immediately after filing

form_16.name: Form 16 (TDS Certificate)
form_16.instructions: Collect from employer before 15 June each financial year • If delayed, request in writing citing IT Act Section 203 • Form 16 Part A can be verified at TRACES portal (tracer.tdscpc.gov.in) • Required for filing Income Tax Return every year

salary_slip.name: Salary Slip / Pay Slip
salary_slip.instructions: Request from employer's HR or payroll department • For government employees, available from office DDO • Salary slips must be issued monthly as per labour law • Preserve past 3–6 months' slips for loan/visa applications

caste_certificate.name: Caste Certificate
caste_certificate.instructions: Apply at Tehsil/SDM office or state e-district portal • Fill prescribed form and submit Aadhaar, address proof, and family caste proof • Revenue/SDM officer conducts inquiry • Certificate issued within 7–21 working days

non_creamy_layer.name: Non-Creamy Layer (NCL) Certificate
non_creamy_layer.instructions: Apply at Tehsil/SDM office or e-district portal • Submit income certificate showing family income below ₹8 lakh annually • Submit Aadhaar, address proof, and caste certificate • Certificate valid for 3 years; issued within 15 days

obc_certificate.name: OBC Certificate
obc_certificate.instructions: Apply at Tehsil or SDM office with caste and NCL status proof • Submit Aadhaar, income certificate, and community proof • Revenue officer conducts verification • OBC certificate with NCL endorsement issued within 15–30 days

sc_certificate.name: SC Certificate
sc_certificate.instructions: Apply at Tehsil/SDM or Revenue Department office • Submit Aadhaar, address proof, and community declaration/proof • Revenue officer verifies with village/ward records • Certificate issued within 7–15 working days

st_certificate.name: ST Certificate
st_certificate.instructions: Apply at District Tribal Welfare Office or Tehsil • Submit Aadhaar, address proof, and tribal community proof • Verification by tribal welfare officer and revenue officer • Certificate issued within 15–30 working days

ews_certificate.name: EWS Certificate (Economically Weaker Section)
ews_certificate.instructions: Apply at Tehsil/SDM office or state e-district portal • Family income must be below ₹8 lakh per year • Submit income, land, and property details with Aadhaar • Revenue officer verifies and issues certificate • Valid for one year; renew annually

bpl_certificate.name: BPL Certificate (Below Poverty Line)
bpl_certificate.instructions: Contact local Gram Panchayat/Ward office or Food & Civil Supplies department • Register family for periodic socio-economic survey • BPL status determined from survey data • Card issued by district authorities after survey verification

domicile_certificate.name: Domicile Certificate
domicile_certificate.instructions: Apply at Tehsil/SDM office or state e-district portal • Submit Aadhaar, address proof showing long-term residence and birth/school certificate • Revenue officer verifies residence history • Certificate issued within 7–15 working days

residence_certificate.name: Residence / Address Proof Certificate
residence_certificate.instructions: Apply at local Gram Panchayat/Ward/Tehsil office • Submit Aadhaar, voter ID, utility bills, or rent agreement • Local authority verifies address • Certificate issued within 7 working days

disability_certificate.name: Disability Certificate (UDID)
disability_certificate.instructions: Visit nearest government hospital with Disability Assessment Board • Get examined by the medical board (relevant specialist) • Submit ID proof, Aadhaar, and medical history • Certificate issued in UDID format • Register on swavlambancard.gov.in for Unique Disability ID

medical_certificate.name: Medical Certificate
medical_certificate.instructions: Visit a registered government doctor or Civil Surgeon • Undergo medical examination as required (fitness, age estimation, etc.) • Doctor issues certificate on official letterhead with registration number • For government employment, certificate from District Medical Officer required

vaccination_certificate.name: Vaccination / Immunization Certificate
vaccination_certificate.instructions: For COVID-19: Download from CoWIN portal (cowin.gov.in) using registered mobile • For childhood immunizations: Collect from health centre • For travel vaccines: Get from designated International Vaccination Centres • WHO-format certificate generated from CoWIN

land_record.name: Land Record (7/12 Extract / ROR)
land_record.instructions: Apply online at your state's land record portal (e.g., mahabhulekh.maharashtra.gov.in, bhulekh.up.nic.in) • Enter district, tehsil, village, and Khasra/Survey number • Download 7/12 extract (Record of Rights) • For certified copy, visit nearest Tehsil/Sub-Registrar office

property_registration.name: Property Registration Document
property_registration.instructions: Visit Sub-Registrar's office with seller, buyer, and two witnesses • Submit sale deed, ID proofs, and property papers • Pay stamp duty and registration fee (varies by state) • Biometric verification of all parties • Registered document ready within 1–2 working days

encumbrance_certificate.name: Encumbrance Certificate (EC)
encumbrance_certificate.instructions: Apply online at state registration portal or visit Sub-Registrar's office • Fill Form 22 with property details (survey number, address) • Pay prescribed fee • EC showing all registered property transactions issued within 1–7 working days

house_tax_receipt.name: House Tax / Property Tax Receipt
house_tax_receipt.instructions: Pay property tax online at your Municipal Corporation/Panchayat portal • Enter property assessment number or owner details • Pay online (credit/debit/UPI) • Download receipt immediately • For disputes, visit Municipal office with previous receipts

noc_certificate.name: No Objection Certificate (NOC)
noc_certificate.instructions: Apply at the issuing authority depending on type (police NOC, housing society NOC, employer NOC, etc.) • Submit application with purpose and ID proof • NOC typically issued within 7–15 working days • Requirements vary based on type and issuing authority

vehicle_rc.name: Vehicle Registration Certificate (RC)
vehicle_rc.instructions: Dealer submits on your behalf for new vehicles; collect from RTO within 30 days • For used vehicles, apply at RTO with Form 29/30 (transfer of ownership) • Submit insurance, PUC, and address proof • Temporary RC issued immediately; permanent RC within 30 days

vehicle_insurance.name: Vehicle Insurance Certificate
vehicle_insurance.instructions: Purchase from any IRDAI-registered insurance company online or offline • Provide vehicle RC details and KYC documents • Pay premium online • Policy certificate available immediately after payment • Renew before expiry to avoid penalties

puc_certificate.name: PUC Certificate (Pollution Under Control)
puc_certificate.instructions: Visit any authorized PUC testing centre (near fuel stations) • Present vehicle RC • Emission test conducted on the spot (₹60–100) • PUC certificate valid for 6 months • Issued immediately after test; mandatory for all vehicles

gst_certificate.name: GST Registration Certificate
gst_certificate.instructions: Register online at gst.gov.in • Provide PAN, Aadhaar, business details, and bank account information • Upload address proof and identity proof • GST officer verifies application • GSTIN and certificate issued within 7 working days

shop_act_license.name: Shop & Establishment License
shop_act_license.instructions: Apply online at state Labour Department portal • Fill details of establishment (name, address, employee count, working hours) • Submit Aadhaar of proprietor/partners and property proof • License issued within 7–30 working days (instant in some states)

trade_license.name: Trade License
trade_license.instructions: Apply online at Municipal Corporation/Panchayat portal • Submit business details, address proof, ID proof, and site plan • Pay prescribed fee • Municipal officer inspects premises • License issued within 15–30 working days after inspection

fssai_certificate.name: FSSAI Food License / Registration
fssai_certificate.instructions: Apply at fssai.gov.in or FoSCoS portal • Choose registration (turnover < ₹12 lakh) or State/Central license based on business scale • Submit business details, Aadhaar/PAN, food safety plan • FSSAI officer may inspect • License issued within 30–60 days

senior_citizen_card.name: Senior Citizen Identity Card
senior_citizen_card.instructions: Apply at District Social Welfare Office or nearest Jan Seva Kendra • Submit Aadhaar, address proof, and age proof (60+ years) • Some states issue through Gram Panchayat or Municipal office • Card entitles holder to concessions in rail, air travel, and healthcare

employment_card.name: Employment Exchange Registration Card
employment_card.instructions: Register online at National Career Service Portal (ncs.gov.in) or visit District Employment Exchange • Submit qualifications, skills, and personal details • Card issued immediately online or within 7 days offline • Renew registration every 3 years

freedom_fighter_certificate.name: Freedom Fighter Certificate (Samman Patra)
freedom_fighter_certificate.instructions: Apply through State Sainik Welfare Board or State Home Department • Submit historical evidence of independence movement participation and affidavits • Application reviewed by state committee • Central Government approval required for Tamra Patra • Process may take 6–12 months

medical_fitness_certificate.name: Medical Fitness Certificate
medical_fitness_certificate.instructions: Visit Government Hospital or designated Medical Officer • Undergo required examinations (vision, hearing, blood pressure, general fitness) • Doctor issues certificate on official letterhead • Required for driving licence, government jobs, and school admissions

other.name: Other Document
other.instructions: Visit the issuing authority relevant to the document type • Carry original ID proof (Aadhaar/PAN/Passport), address proof, and supporting documents • Fill the prescribed application form and pay applicable fees • Collect acknowledgement and retrieve document within the stipulated period
